author: Syzlak
body:
Check out Justin King sometime on YouTube too. He's a slap player that does a lot of tap melody work. It's not necessarily my favorite stuff in the world, but it's very good. I'd link to something, but the quality is so poor…old videos from 2 years ago

Think about that. YouTube videos from only 2 years ago are being deemed “poor.” 2 years…

author: Matt Burgess
body:
What. the. hell. Dude is insane.  
Agree with what you say, not necessarily the easiest stuff to listen to (not easy at all, really)… but totally, completely insane.
